title: Healthy School Lunches - Ministry of Education
content:
## Healthy School Lunches
We provide healthy lunches every school day to more than 240,000 students who need them to support their learning and thrive.
- Food and nutrition 2
- Health and wellbeing 2
- Te Hōtaka Ka Ora, Ka Ako Healthy School Lunches Programme We provide healthy lunches every school day to more than 240,000 students who need them to support their learning and thrive.
We provide healthy lunches every school day to more than 240,000 students who need them to support their learning and thrive.
- Kei ēhea kura a Healthy School Lunches Which schools and kura have Healthy School Lunches We use the Equity Index to work out which schools and kura can join the Healthy School Lunches programme.
